data.name: My Cuckqueen Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
😽 WISHLIST PLEASE 😽 & 😈 Join the Horde 😈


關於此遊戲

My Cuckquean Girlfriend is an adult visual novel about intimacy, honesty, and what happens when desire becomes obsession

Maya isn't jealous. She's aroused by it — the idea of you with another woman lights something up in her she's only just beginning to understand. She wants you to explore. She wants to feel the heat of it from the outside. And she trusts you completely.

For now.

The women you meet are real people with histories, wounds, and needs of their own:

  • Maya — Your girlfriend. The one who started all of this. She's warm, playful, and genuinely excited to watch you with someone else. But beneath that curiosity is a hidden meter ticking quietly upward every time you lie, every time you forget she exists, every time you choose wrong. She loves you completely. That's exactly what makes her dangerous.

  • Sarah — The woman from that first unforgettable night. She doesn't know she was part of something Maya orchestrated. She's furious. She's hurt. And she still thinks about you.

  • Chloe — Sweet, clumsy, freshly scarred by a relationship that left her afraid to trust again. She deserves honesty. What she gets is up to you.

  • Amber — A goth artist who uses sex like a weapon and affection like a trap. She rewards restraint and punishes indulgence.

  • ...and more to come. New women, new routes, and new ways to test — or strengthen — what you have with Maya. Each update expands the world and the consequences within it.

Every choice you make matters — not just to them, but to Maya.

Lie to her, and her obsession quietly grows. Keep secrets long enough, and the warm, curious girl who made you pancakes the morning after starts to change. Her questions get sharper. Her kindness gets colder. Her love starts to look like something else entirely.

There's no wrong way to play — but there are consequences you won't see coming.

Features:

  • Deeply branching narrative with two major path systems: honest and secret routes

  • A hidden obsession mechanic that shapes Maya's behavior across the entire story

  • Multiple unique female characters, each with distinct personalities, kinks, and emotional arcs

  • Choices that carry real weight — characters remember, relationships evolve, and nothing resets

  • Full adult content with emotional context — scenes serve the story, not the other way around

  • A yandere progression system that activates dynamically based on your cumulative decisions

  • Multiple endings shaped by who you were, not just what you did at the end

This is not a power fantasy. It's a relationship — complicated, hot, and entirely dependent on whether you can be honest with the person who loves you most.

data.short_description: Your girlfriend doesn't mind you sleeping with other women. In fact — she loves it. But every secret you keep, every lie you tell, brings her one step closer to something dangerous. Choose carefully!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (e.g., Intel HD Graphics 3000 or better)
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
